title_zh: 新研究展示AMIE医疗AI如何助力健康管理
title_en: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions

summary_en: Research published in "Nature" demonstrates that our conversational AI system, AMIE, matches primary care physicians in managing complex diseases.
why_it_matters_zh: 此研究表明医疗AI有潜力辅助医生提高诊断和治疗效率，推动医疗服务智能化发展。
why_it_matters_en: This research highlights the potential of medical AI to assist physicians in improving diagnosis and treatment efficiency, advancing intelligent healthcare services.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: RIFT-Bench：面向自主AI系统的动态红队测试
title_en: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
summary_zh: RIFT-Bench是一种基于图表示的新方法，针对自主决策的AI系统（由大型语言模型驱动），提供统一的安全评估框架。其分为发现系统结构和扫描自适应攻击两个自动化阶段，能够跨45个不同架构和实现的系统进行效果验证，并支持评估防御策略。该方法解决了传统安全评估局限于特定实现或领域的问题，实现了对异构自主AI系统的全面动态安全检测。
summary_en: RIFT-Bench is a graph representation-driven methodology for dynamic red-teaming agentic AI systems powered by large language models. It operates in two automated phases—Discovery, which extracts system structure, and Scanning, which performs adaptive adversarial attacks—allowing unified and comprehensive security evaluation across 45 diverse agentic architectures. It also supports evaluation of mitigation strategies, addressing limitations of traditional security evaluations tied to specific implementations or domains.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着自主AI系统快速发展，传统的安全评估方法难以统一衡量不同系统的脆弱性。RIFT-Bench通过引入动态和结构化的攻击评估，填补了这一空白，提升了对复杂、多样化AI系统的安全保障能力。
why_it_matters_en: As agentic AI systems evolve rapidly, traditional security evaluations lack a unified framework for diverse architectures. RIFT-Bench fills this gap by enabling dynamic, comprehensive assessments that enhance security understanding and mitigation across heterogeneous autonomous AI systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 神经符号驱动：基于规则的可信推理驱动视觉语言代理
title_en: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs
summary_zh: 本文提出Neuro-Symbolic Drive，一种结合经典基于规则规划器推理轨迹与视觉语言代理（VLA）的驾驶框架。该方法利用规则规划器的执行轨迹和决策痕迹作为结构化监督，微调Qwen3.5-4B模型，使推理过程与运动规划因果连接。实验表明，该方法显著降低了平均距离误差和目标漏检率，提升了多摄像头感知下的驾驶性能。
summary_en: This paper presents Neuro-Symbolic Drive, a driving framework that supervises a visual language agent (VLA) with rule-grounded reasoning traces extracted from classical rule-based planners. By fine-tuning Qwen3.5-4B on planner-generated structured reasoning linked directly to trajectory execution, the approach ensures causally connected reasoning and motion generation. Experiments demonstrate significant reductions in average displacement error and miss rates under multi-camera perception, improving driving VLA accuracy.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究有效解决了当前Chain-of-Thought推理缺乏因果连接推理步骤的问题，通过直接使用规则规划器的决策轨迹作为监督，保证了推理与动作生成的一致性，提高了驾驶模型的性能和可信度。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the limitation of existing Chain-of-Thought reasoning lacking causally connected stepwise semantics by leveraging rule-based planner traces as direct supervision. This ensures structural coupling between reasoning and action generation, enhancing the driving model's performance and reliability.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 本文探讨了“代理”及其构成，特别是在大型语言模型（LLM）兴起、被称为“编码代理”“AI共同科学家”等工具背景下的代理定义。文章梳理了AI代理的现状，从目标、身份、决策、自我调节和学习五个维度分析代理架构，强调真正的代理性需要这些结构内化于系统自身，而非依赖外部组成。区分了“代理性”系统（依赖外部工程流程）与“代理化”系统（内生能力包括社会交互），界定了自动化与自主性的边界。基于此，提出了通用代理模型——目标-身份-配置器（GIC）架构，融合分层目标分解、身份演进、基于世界模型的模拟推理、自我调节与自主学习。并讨论了拥有更大自主性的系统在审计、控制和安全方面的见解。
summary_en: The paper examines the concept of an agent and agency amid the rise of Large Language Model (LLM) systems marketed as coding agents and AI co-scientists. It surveys AI agents and analyzes their architectures across five dimensions: goal, identity, decision-making, self-regulation, and learning. It argues that genuine agency requires these structures to be internalized within the system rather than assembled externally. The paper distinguishes between agentic systems, which rely on engineered workflows, and agentive systems, which have endogenous capabilities including social interaction, defining the boundary between task-designed automation and true autonomy. Building on this, the authors propose the Goal-Identity-Configurator (GIC) architecture, combining hierarchical goal decomposition, identity evolution, simulative reasoning with a trained world model, learned self-regulation, and self-directed learning. Insights on auditability, controllability, and safety of agentive systems under human oversight are also presented.
why_it_matters_zh: 本研究回应了当前关于AI“代理”与自主性的模糊认知，厘清了自动化与代理性间的界限，提出了更具内生性和开放世界操作能力的代理模型，为设计可靠且安全的智能系统提供理论基础，助力未来智能体的发展和监管。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the ambiguity surrounding AI 'agency' and autonomy, clarifying the boundary between automation and genuine agency. It proposes an internally grounded, open-world capable agent model, providing a theoretical foundation for building reliable and safe intelligent systems, thus supporting future development and regulation of autonomous agents.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Critique of Agent Model. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 基于图的嘈杂自动语音识别语音错误纠正
title_en: Graph-Based Phonetic Error Correction of Noisy ASR
summary_zh: 尽管自动语音识别（ASR）系统整体词错误率较低，但仍存在影响语义关键标记（如命名实体、否定词和情感词）的残余词汇错误。这些错误往往具有结构性，源于语音相似性而非随机噪声，使得简单的逐词纠正不足。本文提出G-SPIN框架，结合语音图建模与上下文语言理解，通过图神经网络构建语音邻近候选词，再由掩码语言模型进行局部上下文评分，最后由指令调优的大型语言模型对候选集进行上下文感知重排序，提高纠正准确度。该框架轻量、模块化，完全在推理阶段运行。
summary_en: Despite low overall word error rates, automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems still produce residual lexical errors that disproportionately impact semantically critical tokens like named entities, negations, and sentiment words. These errors are structured, arising from phonetic similarity rather than random noise, making naive token-level correction inadequate. The proposed G-SPIN framework integrates phonetic graph modeling with contextual language understanding. A graph neural network generates acoustically plausible candidate tokens, a masked language model scores them contextually, and an instruction-tuned large language model performs final context-aware re-ranking. This modular, lightweight method operates entirely at inference time, improving correction accuracy without unconstrained generation.
why_it_matters_zh: 该方法通过分离结构化的语音推理与上下文语义选择，避免了无约束生成问题，显著提升了ASR错误纠正的准确性，尤其是针对语义关键的词汇。
why_it_matters_en: By decoupling structured phonetic reasoning from contextual semantic selection, the method avoids unconstrained generation and significantly improves ASR error correction accuracy, especially for semantically critical words.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Graph-Based Phonetic Error Correction of Noisy ASR. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 小规模编辑，大型模型：维基百科倡导如何影响大型语言模型的价值观
title_en: Small edits, large models: How Wikipedia advocacy shapes LLM values
summary_zh: 一项研究表明，一小群志愿者通过编辑维基百科，能够影响人工智能系统关于动物福利的讨论。维基百科内容在各大语言模型的训练数据中占有重要地位。一个名为Pro-Animal Wikipedians (PAW)的动物福利倡导团体进行了125次编辑，覆盖115个条目。通过多种归因方法分析，这些编辑显著提升了模型在动物福利相关查询中的表现，且该影响仅针对相关话题，非一般实体信息。进一步微调模型时，专门训练于PAW内容的模型在动物福利文本上的困惑度显著降低。该研究表明，一场小规模、有组织的维基百科编辑活动可以显著塑造语言模型对相关话题的处理方式。
summary_en: A study shows that a small group of volunteers can influence how AI systems discuss animal welfare by editing Wikipedia, which is heavily weighted in language model training data. The Pro-Animal Wikipedians (PAW) group made 125 edits across 115 pages. Attribution analyses demonstrated that these edits strongly influenced model behavior on animal welfare queries specifically. Fine-tuned models on PAW content performed better on related texts, reducing perplexity notably. This evidence indicates a small, coordinated Wikipedia editing campaign can measurably shape how language models handle topics addressed by those edits.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了开放协作平台如维基百科上的少量编辑，通过培训数据的重要性，可对大型语言模型的价值观和表现产生实质性影响。这说明社区倡导力量可以有效参与和塑造AI系统的知识基础与行为，具有重要的伦理与技术意义。
why_it_matters_en: This research reveals that small edits on open collaborative platforms like Wikipedia can materially influence large language models' values and behavior due to Wikipedia's significant role in training data. It shows community advocacy can effectively shape AI knowledge bases and responses, carrying important ethical and technical implications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Small edits, large models: How Wikipedia advocacy shapes LLM values. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: AgentOdyssey：用于测试时持续学习代理的开放式长时域文本游戏生成
title_en: AgentOdyssey: Open-Ended Long-Horizon Text Game Generation for Test-Time Continual Learning Agents
summary_zh: 为了使代理能够在测试时持续地通过与世界的交互学习，它们必须有效探索、获取新知识与技能、保留相关经历并进行长时域规划。AgentOdyssey提出了一种新颖评估框架，程序化生成包含丰富实体和世界动态的开放式长时域文本游戏。此框架打破传统机器学习测试时不学习的假设，将学习与推理交错进行。评估方法不仅测量游戏进展，还涵盖世界知识获取、情节记忆、探索及动作多样性等诊断测试。实验显示代理存在关键能力限制，尽管性能随基础模型增强提升，但仍远低于人类水平。短期记忆被证明是多种代理范式的重要测试时训练组成部分。
summary_en: To enable agents to continuously learn at test time through interaction with the world, they must effectively explore, acquire new knowledge and skills, retain relevant episodic experiences, and plan over long horizons. AgentOdyssey introduces a novel evaluation framework that procedurally generates open-ended text games with rich entities, world dynamics, and long-horizon tasks. It breaks the conventional assumption that no learning occurs at test time by interleaving learning and inference throughout deployment. The multifaceted evaluation measures game progress and diagnostics including world knowledge acquisition, episodic memory, exploration, action diversity, and cost. Experiments reveal critical limits in agent abilities; while performance improves with stronger base models, even the best agent remains far below human levels. Short-term memory benefits multiple agent paradigms and is key for test-time training.
why_it_matters_zh: AgentOdyssey为持续学习代理提供了一个极具挑战性的长时域、动态交互环境，突破传统评估框架的限制，更真实地反映了代理在实际环境中实时学习和适应能力。这有助于推动人工智能在长期规划和持续学习能力上的发展。
why_it_matters_en: AgentOdyssey offers a challenging long-horizon, dynamic interaction environment for continual learning agents, breaking conventional evaluation assumptions by enabling real-time learning and adaptation during deployment. This fosters advancements in AI's long-term planning and continual learning capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: AgentOdyssey: Open-Ended Long-Horizon Text Game Generation for Test-Time Continual Learning Agents. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 推出FFASR排行榜：现实环境中的语音识别基准
title_en: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
summary_zh: Hugging Face发布了FFASR排行榜，一个专注于实际应用环境中自动语音识别（ASR）性能的评测平台。该排行榜帮助研究人员和开发者真实地评估和比较ASR模型表现。
summary_en: Hugging Face has introduced the FFASR leaderboard, a benchmarking platform focused on assessing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) performance in real-world scenarios. This leaderboard aids researchers and developers in evaluating and comparing ASR model effectiveness under practical conditions.
why_it_matters_zh: 传统ASR评测多在理想环境下进行，缺乏对真实场景的覆盖。FFASR排行榜通过反映真实应用中的挑战，提高了评测的实用性和代表性。
why_it_matters_en: Traditional ASR benchmarks often rely on ideal or controlled settings, lacking coverage of real-world challenges. The FFASR leaderboard enhances evaluation relevance by reflecting practical use-case difficulties, thus boosting benchmarking utility.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_en: GPT-5 Pro's powerful data processing and analytical capabilities aided scientists in cracking complex immune cell behavior puzzles, demonstrating AI's vital role in life sciences.
